description: Crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials and hardware in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. Those who love elegant classics can wear this piece with tonal outfits and add one vibrant, matching piece in the ensemble. Height: 25cm Width: 45cm Depth: 13cm Made of textured leatherette with a metallic brand badge on the front and contrast stitch detailing Two leatherette shoulder handles with bronze detailing Two main compartments with a pouch in the first and a zippered pocket in the second One zippered pocket at the back Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
